event_notes: Source venue label preserved during 2026-03-18 Wave 2 venue canonicalization: Lynndale Park (Night-O).
event_comments:
Event #1/8 in the Ultimate Orienteer Series!
Let’s kick off the 2020 Ultimate Orienteer Series in the dark! Get out your headlamps and join us for this fun event at Lynndale Park in Lynnwood. Even if you’ve been to a park many times, things look different in the dark.
